summary: Iteration 5 verified the three new advanced features end-to-end against the production preview URL: (1) Personal Search Engine — POST /api/search/unified + GET /api/search/sources; (2) Life OS — GET /api/life/scores, /api/life/recommendations, /api/life/dashboard; (3) Chat-driven Digital Twin draft_reply intent through POST /api/chat. Added /app/backend/tests/test_nova_phase3.py with 11 pytest cases — ALL 11 PASSED on the public URL (4.99s). Plus end-to-end UI verification of /search, /life, and home menu navigation in mobile viewport. All 14 review-request bullets verified GREEN.

minor.issue: Ranking score adds a recency bonus even when zero query tokens match, so unrelated recent memories can leak into results with score>0 (no-match queries still return up to top_k recent items). Currently masked by AI synthesis (Nova correctly says 'no specific details'). Consider gating recency bonus behind hits>0 in unified_search.py:_score.

action_items: Optional: tighten unified_search _score so recency bonus only applies when at least one token hits (avoids zero-match items appearing in results).
critical_code_review_comments: unified_search.py:_score adds up to +1.0 recency bonus even when hits==0, so any recent doc can surface for unrelated queries. Low-impact because synthesis layer handles it, but a stricter `if hits>0` gate would make ranking honest.

life_os.py:_health_score baseline is 50 only when no health goals exist; once a health goal is added with progress=0 the score DROPS to 40 (40 + 0*0.6). This is counter-intuitive — adding a goal should never reduce a dimension. Consider max(baseline, 40+progress*0.6) so 'I started tracking' doesn't penalize the user.
server.py:1854 /api/life/dashboard calls get_scores then get_recommendations which itself calls get_scores again — duplicate work. Could be reduced by passing scores into get_recommendations.

Chat-driven draft_reply (server.py:821-862) correctly chains digital_twin.generate_reply_suggestion -> Bedrock fallback with twin style prompt and ALWAYS records the contact interaction via learn_contact_interaction. Marker '✍️ Drafted reply to **{contact}**' verified.

All new screens use data-testid uniformly (search-input, search-filter-{src}, search-example-*, search-answer, search-source-{idx}; life-overall-grade, life-refresh, life-rec-{idx}, life-dim-{health|career|finance|learning|relationships}; menu-search, menu-life) — automation worked first try.
MenuSheet additions render 'Search everything' + 'Life OS' alongside existing rows; nav from menu-search -> /search and menu-life -> /life both succeed on the production preview URL.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 phase-3 pytest, all 5 new endpoints + chat draft_reply intent + reminder intent regression)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (search renders + answers, life OS renders 5 dimensions + recommendations + refresh, menu nav to /search and /life works)

test_credentials: No auth required — backend exposed at https://mobile-app-demo-31.preview.emergentagent.com without bearer tokens.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 health-tagged goal 'TEST_Run 5km daily' with progress=30 to validate Life OS health bump (auto-cleaned by goal collection naming convention).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 endpoints (/api/search/unified, /api/search/sources, /api/life/scores, /api/life/recommendations, /api/life/dashboard) and the draft_reply chat intent are covered in /app/backend/tests/test_nova_phase3.py. UI test IDs in place: search-input, search-filter-{chat|memory|goal|reminder|knowledge|finance|calendar|email}, search-example-{slice}, search-answer, search-source-{idx}; life-overall-grade, life-refresh, life-rec-{idx}, life-dim-{health|career|finance|learning|relationships}; menu-search, menu-life. Note that ChatRequest schema uses field name 'message' (not 'content') — IMPORTANT for any future chat-related test.
rca_of_issue: No blocking bugs. The two code-quality issues called out (recency-only matches in unified_search; goal-without-progress lowering health) are minor UX/ranking edge cases, not functional defects — every spec bullet passed.
